title: [FIRRTL] getOrAddInnerSym: fix bug when targeting a field
body: When an `InnerSymbolTarget` targets a field, `target.isOpOnly()` returns false. `getOrAddInnerSym` was mistakenly using this function to determine if the target was a port or a regular operation, causing it to treat all targets with fieldIDs as port targets.  This crashes when casting the target operation to a module op.  This changes `getOrAddInnerSym` to use `!target.isPort()` instead of `target.isOpOnly()` to check if the target is a port.
